_blueprint: Composer 2 implements from this structure. JSON does not support comments.
_purpose: VS Code / Codespaces devcontainer configuration. Python 3.12+, Docker-in-Docker, Make, Git. Per spec §26.12 item 342.

_sections.name: Template Repository Dev Container
_sections.image_or_build: Use official Python 3.12 devcontainer base or build from Dockerfile

_design_decisions: postCreateCommand runs setup.sh to install deps and run initial validation
docker-in-docker: allows running docker compose inside the devcontainer
Python path points to .venv for consistent tooling
